question: The YouTube channel Game Grumps began a Let’s Play of the game Sonic the Hedgehog (2006) in the year 2012. Thirty seconds into the first episode, a phrase is shown on the screen in white letters on a red background. How many times does the letter "E" appear in this phrase?

In this interview, he discusses his work at (truncated) Thought: I now have the final answer: from the webpages visited, Stanislaus Ulam says of Einstein: "He learned too much mathematics and sort of diminished, it seems to me personally, it seems to me his purely physics creativity." Thought: I will use the tool `wikipedia_search` to get the age of the pope, and confirm that with a web search. pope_age_wiki = wikipedia_search(query="current pope age") print("Pope age as per wikipedia:", pope_age_wiki) pope_age_search = web_search(query="current pope age") print("Pope age as per google search:", pope_age_search) Observation: Pope age: "The pope Francis is currently 88 years old."
